title: verbascum × regelianum
intro: Verbascum × regelianum, also known as the giant mullein, is a sterile hybrid plant that belongs to the figwort family. It has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and heal wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to calm respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its effectiveness in treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Verbascum × regelianum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
